params.name: Avelon
params.source: Fragment Crafting (30.8%), Lottery Machine (0.66%), Wishing (2.8%), Expert Scrolls (7.6%)
params.description:
On Feb 1, AD 500, this sword became one of Arthur's personal weapons.

Arthur got a scabbard that is said to grant the owner immortality by healing wounds and preventing aging. Merlin once warned, "The Excalibur is powerful, but the scabbard is even more valuable than the sword. The scabbard holder will never shed blood, and you must never lose it." But Arthur lost the scabbard anyway and was killed by a traitor. Under Arthur's orders, this sword was eventually thrown into the lake and was retur …
